name: Tsunagari Chess School
short_description: ​Welcome to the chess school! Connect with the brilliant girls of Sakuragi town and engage them in chess matches. How will you master the moves that come your way?​
detailed_description:
Hi, I'm Yumiko!

In charge of admin matters here at Sakugari chess school~ 🌸

I'm pleased to welcome you! It is my ambition to share the beauty of chess with you, teaching and learning together step by step.

We’ll pair you with the other girls during class to help you master new strategies and level up your game!

Oh, and we also host fun events outside of class, so there’s always something to look forward to!

I can't wait to meet you in person! Let’s make lots of great memories together! ❤️

Features:

  • Meet your new classmates at Sakuragi chess school and get to know them

  • Engage with the girls in mini chess battles (chess knowledge not required)

  • Chat after class, go on dates, explore around the school

  • Utilize your fully functional flip phone to your advantage

  • Collect items and unlock doors to understand more about the secrets of the school

  • D̴͖͚̬̺͉̘̫͎̀͆̂͌͋͆̽̾̋͐̑̈́̇͘ơ̴̛̠͎̱̙̻͉͈͋̊̓͛̽́̍̇͑͌̋̋̀́͘ ̸̪̏͋͗̕n̸̡̦̜̤̪̰͉̤͙̱̠̞̪̼͌̂̓͗̒͐͠ǫ̷̛͍̩̺̱̲̤͚̯͖̜͐̐͛̐̅̋͆̀̆͑́͆̚͝t̴̨̧̩̤͕̜̬͎̙̲͔̖̜̍̌̈́͆̅̓̏ ̶̡̮̭͕̰͈͚̞̬̝͙̮̣̟̱̈́͂ͅͅĕ̴̢̡̳̟̫̞̻̺̠̾ͅn̸̡̞͕̭͕̹̻͕͙̩̖̩͕̽̊͑̊̐̃͜͝t̸̠̙̞͔̖̼͑͆͋̂̆͌̊̌́͑̎̿̇̄̈́ͅe̵͖̰͛͂̃̇̂̍̑̓̒͛̔́̔̍̚͝͠r̷̩̰͓̽ ̷̧̥̰̣̺͇̭͎̮͌͑̅̍̒͛͆͒͗͜t̴̢̝͙̰̫̠̔͐͊͆̃͛͛̓̅͂̿̅̋̚͘͝ḥ̷̛̛̖̓̓̿̓͗̒̍͛͘͠ë̵̡̝̰̻͈̮́̅ ̴̢̢̛̖͙̯̠̯̱͍̲̖̠͙̔̐̃͆̈͛̋̒̽̋̃͑̍̚͝͝ͅç̶̛̛̟̺̻̻̙̩͔̻̯̝͔͍̰̯͚̐͑̈́̈̃̒̂̏͒̊̀̆͝͝l̶̡̻̙̣͈̦̫̞̬̺̬͚͔̻̫̏̊̈̓̋͋ơ̴̢̧̭̈́͛̉̒̽̎̏̚̕͝s̸̩̺͔͖̯̬̬̰̤͙̫̮͈̞̮͇̣̏̈ë̵̡̛͕̭̰̖̤͓͚́̽̐̍̍̓͌̾͛̽̓̚͝t̴̢̻̝̣̥̥͙̞̟̫̮͔͋̉̋̆̚͘͝

  • Engage in another type of battle... ?

This game contains themes that may be

unsettling or disturbing to some players
